arn.description: Amazon Resource Name for permissions and API operations

cluster_address.description: Primary endpoint address for connecting to the DAX cluster

configuration_endpoint.description: Endpoint used for configuring the DAX cluster

id.description: Unique identifier for managing the DAX cluster

nodes.description: List of nodes in the DAX cluster with their details

port.description: Port number for accessing the DAX cluster

tags_all.description: Consolidated list of tags applied to the DAX cluster
